metric_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 3 DAY

asynchronous_metric_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 3 DAY

part_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 3 DAY
